title: Oh, Shiny!
description: Not enough golden food? Well, have some more.
body:
Adds Golden Foods to minecraft similar to golden apples to Minecraft. 

Each food gives a different effect, helping you in someway.

All foods can be crafted by surrounding the corresponding food with gold.
This is a very ambtious project, and in the end all items will have golden variants.
